'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=FD3QyiUJfZB4Z_vTCcUI5VaB8uBQGuVyDtq3dferyuE-1776073618-1.0.1.1-36K4kA8QPuO9JsmIpQcHiKSHIPkB7_SFT5Z8XYxZ5sk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
